title: Australian Beef Burger
description: A classic beef burger with a rustic twist, featuring roasted australian beef and topped with your favorite condiments.

ingredients.name: Roasted Australian Beef Patties
ingredients.notes: seasoned with salt, pepper, and your choice of herbs

ingredients.name: Australian Beef
ingredients.notes: minced and mixed with egg and breadcrumbs

instructions: 1. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
2. Form the Australian beef into 4 patties and season with salt and pepper.
3. Add the patties to the grill and cook for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
4. Meanwhile, toast the rustic burger buns on the grill or in a toaster.

5. Assemble the burgers by spreading mayonnaise on the bottom bun, followed by a cooked patty, a slice of cheese (if using), a lettuce leaf, a tomato slice, an onion slice, and a few slices of pickle.
6. Top with the top bun and serve immediately.
